title: Simulation mismatch RTL vs. Synthesized.
body:
Copy all files from Archive.zip and simlib.v to same directory and execute ./st.sh
Iverilog and vsim both give same simulation output. b_out will change to 1 at 135.
Synthesized result gives different output. b_out doesn't change to 1.

Files:
SCRIPT: st.sh
RTL: stg_bug.v
TB: tb_stg.v
YS: stg.ys
NET: y_stg_bug.v (script will generate this)

[Archive.zip](https://github.com/cliffordwolf/yosys/files/210035/Archive.zip)
